title: Sarah Szvetecz Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Sarah Szvetecz Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Sarah Szvetecz
PhD Student
PhD in Computer Science ’28
Computational Biology Student
For a long time, Sarah Szvetecz thought that her aversion to the sight of blood would preclude a career in science and health care. After discovering computational biology, though, that world opened up to her, and now her cancer research is aiding the discovery of new drugs.
Knowing that you’re contributing to something that impactful and meaningful is just really inspiring
Sarah Szvetecz, PhD in Computer Science ’28
Explore all Khoury Stories
